A: Closed(resolved)
B: InProgress
C: Closed(cancelled)
D: New

steps.find:
fn apply_event(state: State, event: &Event) -> State {
    match (state, event) {
        (State::New, Event::Start) => State::InProgress,
        (State::InProgress, Event::Hold) => State::OnHold,
        (State::OnHold, Event::Resume) => State::InProgress,
        (State::InProgress, Event::Resolve) => State::Closed("resolved"),
        (State::OnHold, Event::Resolve) => State::Closed("resolved"),
        (State::New, Event::Cancel) => State::Closed("cancelled"),
        (State::InProgress, Event::Cancel) => State::Closed("cancelled"),
        (State::OnHold, Event::Cancel) => State::Closed("cancelled"),
        (State::Closed(_), Event::Reopen) => State::New,
        (s, _) => s,
    }
}

spec.final: FINAL: Patched the ticket lifecycle transition rules so reopen behavior now depends on the prior closed reason, producing the expected final state summary.
